title: Physocarpus torreyi
taxonomy: Physocarpus torreyi is classified within the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the rose family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and relationships to other species within the family. The genus Physocarpus is further grouped within the subfamily Rosoideae, which also includes other plants such as roses and blackberries. Within the subfamily, Physocarpus torreyi is part of the tribe Rosae, along with other rose-like plants. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally agreed upon that Physocarpus torreyi belongs to the family Rosaceae.
